message:
fix: dog model tier always Haiku + self-termination on completion

Dogs are lightweight utility agents that don't need expensive models.
Add early return in resolveRoleAgentConfigCore() for role=dog returning
claudeHaikuPreset(). Update dog instructions to self-terminate with
gt dog done + /exit instead of returning to idle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
